description: Search for or read a FHIR PractitionerRole resource linking practitioners to organizations, locations, specialties, and services. For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, provide at least one scoping param such as practitioner, organization, location, role, specialty, or identifier.

searchParams._id: PractitionerRole resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.active: Whether this practitioner role record is active
searchParams.date: The period during which the practitioner is authorized for these roles
searchParams.endpoint: Technical endpoints providing access to services
searchParams.location: Location where this practitioner provides care
searchParams.service: Healthcare services provided for this role
